scripts.build-web: npx expo export --platform web --clear && powershell -Command "$target='dist/fonts'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $target -Force; Get-ChildItem -Path 'dist' -Recurse -Include *.ttf | ForEach-Object { Move-Item $_.FullName -Destination $target -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-ChildItem -Path 'dist' -Filter *.js -Recurse | ForEach-Object { $c = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw; $old = 'assets/node_modules/@expo/vector-icons/build/vendor/react-native-vector-icons/Fonts/'; $new = 'fonts/'; $c = $c.Replace($old, $new); [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($_.FullName, $c) }"
